certificate: Under A=u+v, B=u-v, the polynomial becomes P_w=(u-1)^2 Q_w(u)+v^2 R_w(u,v^2), where Q_w and R_w have nonnegative integer coefficients.
consequence: P_w(A,B)>=0 for all A,B>=0. Equality occurs only on the equal diagonal in this pair-stabilized family.
name: Exact pair-stabilized shell gap certificate
normalization: P_w(A,B)=A_w(1)(A^2+B^2+22)^(w/2)-24^(w/2)(n11 AB+n10(A+B)+n00), where n11,n10,n00 are the pair membership profile counts.
role_in_global_proof: This closes the exact pair-stabilized 3-level obstruction and supplies a local model for the Barrier Schur Compression Lemma.
statement: For w=12,16, restrict to vectors with two distinguished coordinates A,B and the other 22 coordinates equal to C. By homogeneity set C=1. The shell gap is nonnegative for all A,B>=0.
